name: Angular
description: A comprehensive TypeScript-based web application framework. Angular provides a complete solution for building large-scale enterprise applications with built-in routing, state management, form handling, and HTTP client.
advantages: Full-featured framework with built-in solutions for common needs
Strong typing with TypeScript from the ground up
Dependency injection promotes modular and testable code
Powerful CLI for scaffolding and building projects
disadvantages: Steep learning curve compared to React or Vue
Larger bundle size out of the box
Framework updates can introduce significant changes
